description: Legal document. In Arabic script. Describes various architectural elements of a house: the living room (majlis), the guesthouse (dār al-ḍiyāfa), the wind catcher (al-bādhanj). Signed by Muḥammad b. Mūsā b. ʿAlī, among others. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
